page_metadata.biotools__summary: CATA (The chromatin accessibility of cancer database) is a comprehensive Cancer ATAC-seq database that aim to provided a large number of available resources on cancer ATAC-seq datas. The database was annotated with potential functions of ATAC-Peak in the cancer.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CATA (The chromatin accessibility of cancer database) is a comprehensive Cancer ATAC-seq database that aim to provided a large number of available resources on cancer ATAC-seq datas. The database was annotated with potential functions of ATAC-Peak in the cancer.
